commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor action is needed to refresh current-head real Gateway proof before maintainer merge review.; Cleared: The diff adds a read-only Gateway/protocol path and tests without workflow, dependency, package-script, credential, or secret-handling changes. (sha=2c324ca6a4cb723a8c6d89917d14ef8fabc45019)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a read-only `image.providers` Gateway RPC, protocol schema/types, lazy server handler registration, and handler tests for image-generation provider inventory.

PR surface: Source +305, Tests +445. Total +750 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an additive feature PR; source inspection shows current main lacks an `image.providers` Gateway method while the PR branch adds one.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed to refresh current-head real Gateway proof before maintainer merge review.

target.title: fix(gateway): expose image generation provider inventory over RPC
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Console needs to render image generation provider settings but currently must spawn CLI process (`openclaw infer image providers --json`) on every refresh. This is expensive on small hosted machines (CPU, memory, disk I/O pressure). The `image.providers` Gateway RPC provides the same data over lightweight Gateway without CLI spawn.

## Summary

Add read-only `image.providers` Gateway RPC that exposes image generation provider inventory metadata (id, label, configured, defaultModel, models, capabilities) without credentials or secrets. Follows the same pattern as `tts.providers`.

## Changes

- Add `image.providers` to Gateway core descriptors (operator.read scope)
- Create `imageHandlers` module following `tts.providers` pattern
- Register lazy handler in `server-methods.ts`
- Add protocol schema and validator in `gateway-protocol` package
- Handler validates response against schema before returning to client
- Export ImageProvidersResult and ImageProvider types from protocol index
- Add 10 test cases including regression tests

## Why now

Console needs to render image generation provider settings without periodically spawning `openclaw infer image providers --json`. CLI invocation is expensive on small hosted machines (CPU, memory, disk I/O pressure). This RPC provides the same data over lightweight Gateway, matching the existing `tts.providers` pattern.

See: #78330

## Evidence

**Verified via:**
1. CLI real output: `pnpm openclaw infer image providers --json` (live terminal)
2. Tests: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/image.test.ts` → 20 passed

**Environment:**
- Git commit: 2c324ca6a4
- Node: v22.19.0

**Real terminal output (CLI):**
```
$ pnpm openclaw infer image providers --json
[
  {
    "available": true,
    "configured": false,
    "selected": false,
    "id": "comfy",
    "label": "ComfyUI",
    "defaultModel": "workflow",
    "models": ["workflow"],
    "capabilities": {
      "generate": { "maxCount": 1, "supportsSize": false },
      "edit": { "enabled": true, "maxCount": 1 }
    }
  },
  {
    "available": true,
    "configured": false,
    "selected": false,
    "id": "openai",
    "label": "OpenAI",
    "defaultModel": "gpt-image-2",
    "models": ["gpt-image-2", "gpt-image-1.5", "gpt-image-1"],
    "capabilities": {
      "generate": { "maxCount": 4, "supportsSize": true },
      "edit": { "enabled": true, "maxCount": 4 },
      "geometry": { "sizes": ["1024x1024", "2048x2048"] },
      "output": { "formats": ["png", "jpeg", "webp"] }
    }
  },
  ...
]
```

**Test output:**
```
 RUN  v4.1.8
 Test Files  2 passed (2)
 Tests  20 passed (20)
 Duration  781ms
```

**Expected RPC response:**
```json
{
  "providers": [
    {
      "id": "openai",
      "label": "OpenAI",
      "configured": false,
      "defaultModel": "gpt-image-2",
      "models": ["gpt-image-2", "gpt-image-1.5", "gpt-image-1"],
      "capabilities": {
        "generate": { "enabled": true },
        "edit": { "enabled": true },
        "geometry": { "sizes": ["1024x1024", "2048x2048"] },
        "output": ["png", "jpeg", "webp"]
      }
    }
  ],
  "active": null
}
```

## Verification

- `pnpm build` passes
- `pnpm openclaw infer image providers --json` works (live CLI call)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/image.test.ts` passes (20 tests)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/method-scopes.test.ts -t "classifies every"` passes
- image.providers in CORE_GATEWAY_METHOD_SPECS

## Risk assessment

- **merge-risk: low** — Read-only RPC. Uses canonical auth profile store. No credentials exposed.

## Related

- Fixes #78330

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: xydigit-zt
